description: Enchanted and magical plants found in fantasy settings.
plants: Moonpetal
Silver-white flowers that bloom only under moonlight, their petals glowing faintly as if holding a piece of the night sky.
Whisperleaf
Broad papery leaves that rustle with what sounds like murmured words, even when the air is perfectly still.
Bloodthorn
Dark crimson thorns that weep red sap, growing thicker wherever old battles were fought.
Starbloom
Tiny flowers that open at dusk and glow like scattered embers, dotting the forest floor with their own constellation.
Dreamvine
A slow-creeping vine whose pollen brings vivid dreams to anyone who sleeps nearby.
Spellroot
Gnarled roots that pulse with a faint inner light, prized by herbalists for their potent magical properties.
Crystalwort
Translucent leaves that chime softly when touched, each one veined with something that catches light like glass.
Witchwood
Twisted dark trees whose branches move on their own, slowly closing gaps as if guarding what lies beyond.
Fae Blossom
Flowers that shift color throughout the day, never quite the same shade twice, said to mark where fae have danced.
Shadowmoss
Black moss that grows in places sunlight refuses to reach, cold to the touch and faintly damp.
Phoenix Fern
Burns to ash every autumn and regrows from the same spot each spring, its fronds tinged with orange and gold.
Soulwood
Ancient trees whose heartwood hums with a low resonance, as though something is dreaming inside the trunk.
